devices.title: Connected Devices
devices.no_devices: No devices connected. Use the buttons below or connect a USB cable.
devices.guide_pair_desc1: Make sure your phone and computer are on the same Wi-Fi network or both connected to Tailscale VPN.
devices.guide_pair_desc2: Go to Settings > About Phone. Tap 'Build Number' 7 times until you see a message stating you are a developer.
devices.guide_pair_desc3: Go to Settings > System > Developer Options. Find and turn on 'Wireless Debugging'.
devices.guide_pair_desc4: Tap on 'Wireless Debugging' to enter its detailed settings. Choose 'Pair device with pairing code'. Note down the IP address, Pairing Port (5 digits), and 6-digit PIN code.
devices.guide_pair_desc5: Click the 'Pair Device' button on this dashboard, fill in the IP, Pairing Port, and 6-digit Code, and hit Pair. Once successful, the device is ready to Connect.
devices.guide_connect_step1_1: Turn on Wireless Debugging on your phone.
devices.guide_connect_step1_2: Look at 'IP address & Port' on the Wireless Debugging main screen (e.g. 100.x.y.z:41235). This connection port is different from the pairing port and changes every time.
devices.guide_connect_step1_3: Enter that IP and connection Port into the 'Connect Wireless' form on the web dashboard to start ADB.
devices.guide_connect_desc2: Case 2: Android 10 and below (or activation via USB)
devices.guide_connect_step2_1: Connect your device to the computer using a USB cable.
devices.guide_connect_step2_2: Enable USB Debugging on the phone and authorize the computer.
devices.guide_connect_step2_3: Unplug the cable. The device will stay online and connected wirelessly.

logcat.title: Real-time Logcat Viewer
logcat.select_device_warning: Please select a connected device from the sidebar to stream logs.
logcat.no_logs: No logs received. Make sure debugging is enabled on the device.

apk.title: APK Installation & Sharing
apk.share_desc: If the phone is not connected to ADB, scan this QR code to download and install manually.

settings.title: Application Settings
settings.ngrok_desc: Expose your local server to the Internet to share APK files with devices on mobile data or other Wi-Fi networks. If you don't have an account, sign up for free to get your Authtoken at:
